Title: Comparative classroom survey
Abstract
This study may be associated with different outcomes across conditions.
Methods
Participants (N = 60) completed two survey blocks in sequence. We compared outcomes across the observed conditions.
Results
A difference was observed, p = 0.04, 95% CI [0.01, 0.40].
Discussion
The pattern may reflect a context-sensitive association.
References
Jones, B. (2020). Example article.
